name: Specialist Bench
description: 6 specialist subagents + domain modes. For complex multi-domain work. Adversarial roles (architecture-critic, red-team) run via the local Gemini CLI — see ADR-012.

notes.gemini_requirement: Artifact 4's tier-3 manifest required Keychain item `google-ai-api-key` and `openai-api-key-gpt5`. Per ADR-011 (Codex) and ADR-012 (Gemini), OpenAI- and Gemini-family work routes through the local CLIs instead — requirements are `command: codex` and `command: gemini`.
notes.domain_modes_path: domain-modes.json installs to ~/.claude/config/domain-modes.json (the /domain-mode skill reads it from there). Artifact 4's manifest said ~/.claude/domain-modes.json — corrected for consistency with the skill and the other config files.
notes.prompt_caching: config/prompt-caching.json is installed at Tier 2 (tier-3 extends tier-2); not re-listed here.
